name: Position: Stop Reactively Patching Your Model Every Time and Start Proactive Test-Driven AI Development

description: arXiv:2607.20532v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Many modern AI systems are designed to operate under diverse, open-ended, use-cases. To help generalize deployed systems, many deployed-system maintenance pipelines use a reactive AI flywheel that observes emerging feedback from user behavior (errors) and patches the model accordingly. However, when used as the primary maintenance mechanism, the...
author: Nadine Chang, Maying Shen, Jialiang Wang, Rafid Mahmood, Jose M. Alvarez
